page.title: Documents
page.description: Manage all uploaded materials and track sharing and heat.

upload.title: Upload Document
upload.description: Drag a file below, or click to select. Supports PDF, Word, PPT, and Excel.
upload.dragDescription: Or click to select files. Supports PDF / Word / PPT / Excel

table.emptyDescription: Upload your first document to create secure share links and track investor and buyer engagement.

columns.downloadDisabled: Download requires backend signed URL support
columns.archiveDisabled: Only ready documents can be archived

detail.downloadDisabled: Download requires backend signed URL support
detail.linksEmptyDescription: Click Create link in the top right to start sharing.

deleteDialog.title: Delete document
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? Associated links will become invalid and this action cannot be undone.

analytics.title: Time on page
analytics.emptyDescription: This document hasn't been viewed yet. Time on page will appear after the first visit.

content.evidenceSrOnly: This page contains AI evidence highlights

aiInsights.emptyDescription: After the document is viewed, AI will generate key insights based on real reading behavior.
aiInsights.title: AI insights
aiInsights.topPageDescription: Average time on page {{seconds}}s, indicating this is a decision-critical page.
aiInsights.exitRisk: Page {{pageNumber}} has a high exit rate
aiInsights.exitRiskDescription: Exit rate {{percent}}%, consider optimizing content or adding explanations.
aiInsights.evidenceDrivenDescription: All AI conclusions include page numbers and source locations; view highlights in the Content tab.

questions.risks: What are the most critical risks in this document?
questions.focus: Which pages do investors care about most?
questions.optimize: How should I optimize this document?

viewer.notFound: Document does not exist or cannot be loaded
viewer.downloadDisabled: Download requires backend signed URL support
viewer.emailRequired: Please enter your email to continue.
viewer.codeRequired: Please enter the email verification code to continue.
viewer.passwordRequired: Please enter the link password to continue.
viewer.ndaLabel: I agree to the non-disclosure agreement
viewer.ndaRequired: Please agree to the non-disclosure agreement to continue.
viewer.ndaPreviewUnavailable: Preview is not ready yet. Open the full agreement to review it.
viewer.ndaDeliveryEmailPlaceholder: Enter the email to receive the signed NDA
viewer.ndaDeliveryEmailHint: We will email the sealed PDF to this address after you sign.
viewer.ndaDeliveryEmailRequired: Please enter a valid email to receive the signed agreement.
viewer.signerNameRequired: Please enter your full name to sign the NDA
viewer.codeSent: Verification code sent to your email.
viewer.sendCodeFailed: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
viewer.link_not_foundDescription: This share link doesn’t exist or has been deleted. Please check the URL.
viewer.link_expiredDescription: This share link has expired. Please ask the sender for a new link.
viewer.link_revokedDescription: This share link has been disabled. Please contact the sender for a new link.
viewer.link_disabledDescription: This share link is currently inactive. Please contact the sender to check if it can be re-enabled.
viewer.link_max_access_reachedDescription: This link has reached its access limit. Please contact the sender.
viewer.blocked_emailDescription: This email has been blocked from viewing this link. If you need access, contact the sender.
viewer.not_allowedDescription: You are not on the allowed list for this link. Please contact the sender to request access.
viewer.emailNotAllowed: The email you entered does not have access. Please enter an authorized email.
viewer.emailNotAuthorized: This email is not on the allowlist for this link. Please re-enter the reserved email, or request access authorization.
viewer.emailBlocked: This email is blocked from viewing this link. Try a different email, or contact the owner.
viewer.emailMismatch: The reserved delivery email does not match this link’s verification code. Please go back and re-enter the reserved email, or request access authorization.
viewer.deliveryChangeOldMismatch: That email does not match the reserved email on this device. Please try again.
viewer.deliveryChangeCodePlaceholder: Enter the code sent to your current reserved email
viewer.deliveryChangeNewPlaceholder: Enter the new email for the signed agreement
viewer.deliveryChangeFailed: Could not change the reserved email. Please try again.
viewer.deliveryChangeCodeSent: A verification code was sent to your current reserved email.
viewer.accessRequestHint: We will ask the link owner to allow this reserved email. After approval, refresh this page and enter the new verification code.
viewer.accessRequestReasonPlaceholder: e.g. A partner needs access to review these materials
viewer.accessRequestReasonRequired: Please enter a reason for the access request.
viewer.accessRequestFailed: Could not submit the access request. Please try again.
viewer.accessRequestSubmittedDescription: Your access request for {{email}} was submitted. The owner will review it shortly.
viewer.accessRequestRefreshHint: After approval, refresh this page or tap Continue below, then enter the new verification code. Your NDA details are kept on this device until Access succeeds.
viewer.accessRequestStillPending: This email is still waiting for approval. Please try again after the owner approves your request.
viewer.invite_expiredDescription: This invitation has expired. Please contact the sender for a new invitation.
viewer.invite_revokedDescription: This invitation has been revoked. Please contact the sender if you think this is a mistake.
viewer.invite_already_usedDescription: This invitation has already been used. Please contact the sender for a new invitation.
viewer.qaDisabled: Ask Host is not available for this link
viewer.qaRateLimited: Too many Ask Host questions. Please wait and try again.
viewer.qaLimiterUnavailable: Ask Host is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
viewer.qaEmpty: No questions yet. Ask the host about this document.
viewer.qaAIPlaceholder: Ask about materials authorized for this link...
viewer.qaEmptyUnified: No messages yet. Start a conversation.
viewer.qaEmptyHint: Ask Docs first; switch to Ask Host if you need missing materials.
viewer.qaEmptyPromptSummarize: Summarize key points from authorized materials
viewer.qaNoEvidence: I couldn't find supporting material in the documents you can access for this link.
viewer.qaSuggestAskHost: You can ask the host instead.
viewer.qaChannelHint: This looks like a request for missing materials. Ask Host may be a better fit — you can still send via Ask Docs.
viewer.printWarningHint: Content may include identifying watermarks and stay attributable.
viewer.inactiveBlurHint: Helps reduce leak risk; screenshots remain attributable via watermark.
